TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jerrelle_Benimon, title = Jerrelle_Benimon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerrelle_Benimon} }

S.FORM: Jerrelle Benimon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Jerrelle Benimon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jerrelle Benimon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Jerrelle Benimon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *errelle βenimon ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *errelle βenimon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
